name: team-task-manager-ultra-pro
description: Ultra professional full-stack Team Task Manager with RBAC, Kanban UI, comments, activity logs, REST API, PostgreSQL, Prisma and Railway deployment.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run prisma:generate && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.fix:local: npm run db:up && npm run db:migrate && npm run prisma:generate && npm run seed
